result_claim_allowed_when: raw-vLLM endpoint and fak-gateway endpoint both pass tool-call probes
both arms run the same selected SWE-bench instance IDs
official SWE-bench harness grades both arms
GLM-5.2/vLLM battery final-check status is COMPLETE

arms.engine: fak serve fronting the same raw vLLM endpoint

commands.compare_preflight: python tools/dgx_swebench_compare.py --engine vllm --model zai-org/GLM-5.2-FP8 --served-model-name glm-5.2 --raw-base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1 --verified-count 20 --skip-engine-serve --require-tool-calls --require-grade --run-dir /tmp/swe-glm52-vllm-20 --require-gpu-name H200 --preflight-only
commands.compare_run: python tools/dgx_swebench_compare.py --engine vllm --model zai-org/GLM-5.2-FP8 --served-model-name glm-5.2 --raw-base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1 --verified-count 20 --skip-engine-serve --require-tool-calls --require-grade --run-dir /tmp/swe-glm52-vllm-20 --require-gpu-name H200

honesty: This is a run contract, not a benchmark result. It records the identity, arms, budgets, required metrics, and artifact boundaries for the future live GLM-5.2/vLLM comparison.
